narration: Imagine a trip around the world in water droplets
slide_points: Identify key stages of water cycle
Relate water cycle to real life

narration: Water from oceans, lakes, and rivers evaporates into the air like water from a hot cup on a cold day
As water vapor rises, it cools down and forms clouds, similar to how breath fogs up a mirror
When clouds get too heavy with water, they release it back to Earth as rain or snow, just like an overflowing bucket
Water cycle repeats, keeping our planet full of life What is the first stage of the water cycle?
slide_points: What is the first stage of the water cycle?
